name: FilterDisplay
description: Filters and displays elements from a TimberModel by level or layer path.

inputParameters.name: filter_paths
inputParameters.description: Optional list of Elements or layer_path tuples to filter geometry output.

inputParameters.name: display_level
inputParameters.description: What level of the hierarchy to display: 'panel', 'layer', or unset for framing elements.

inputParameters.name: CreateGeometry
inputParameters.description: If True, full geometry is created. Otherwise blank/shape.
